creator: khng@freebsd.org
text:
Hi,

I am writing to take the maintainership of chinese/librime and chinese/fcitx-rime. I have been maintaining chinese/rime-data and all its dependencies and chinese/ibus-rime, so I would like to maintain chinese/librime as well to make sure that any changes related to RIME can be pushed at almost the same time once approved.

Ka Ho
